description: Simple CTE (WITH clause) that filters rows and is consumed by outer SELECT
name: simple_cte
query_sql:
-- @name GetActiveUsers
-- @returns :many
WITH active_users AS (SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = 'active') SELECT * FROM active_users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
